title: Truist Plans to Sell 20% of Its Strong Insurance Unit: Is This the Right Move?
text: Stone Point Capital will take a 20% stake in the insurance unit.

title: Truist (TFC) to Divest 20% Stake in Insurance Arm for $1.95B
text: Truist's (TFC) plan to divest 20% stake in TIH unlocks value for the business and is expected to be accretive to earnings over time.

title: Monetizing The Insurance Business Gives Truist Options, But Also Brings Risk
text: Truist has chosen to sell a 20% stake in its insurance brokerage business to Stone Capital Partners for $1.95B. The transaction values the insurance brokerage business at $14.75B, or about 17x trailing EBITDA and 27.4x trailing P/E, a good price relative to the business's status and relative performance.

title: Truist cancels participation in the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Feb. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced the cancellation of its participation in the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference due to its announcement and conference call regarding its agreement to sell a minority stake in Truist Insurance Holdings.

title: Truist announces agreement to sell minority stake in Truist Insurance Holdings to Stone Point Capital, valuing the business at $14.75 billion
text: Sale of 20% stake for $1.95 billion strategically positions Truist Insurance Holdings for long-term success and growth Truist maintains client service approach, strategic flexibility, and future upside in insurance business Stone Point is a blue-chip partner with extensive experience in financial services Truist to host investor call at 9:00 a.m. ET today, Feb. 16, 2023 CHARLOTTE, N.C.

title: Truist to present at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Feb. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced that Chief Financial Officer Mike Maguire will present at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference on Thursday, Feb. 16, 2023 at 8:50 a.m.

title: High Yield Stock Watchlist - February 2023
text: There are 12 stocks on my high-yield watchlist for February 2023. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are undervalued based on dividend yield theory.

title: Kensington Vanguard National Land Services Hires Industry Veterans Steve LaForgia and James Cosolito as Senior Executive Vice Presidents
text: NEW YORK , Feb. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Kensington Vanguard National Land Services ("KV"), one of the largest independent, full-service national title insurance agencies in the country, has hired Steve LaForgia and James Cosolito, two highly experienced title insurance executives whose combined industry experience spans almost 40 years. "Steve and Jimmy worked here early in their careers and have since become institutional brand names in the space.

title: Truist increases prime rate to 7.75%
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) announced an increase in its prime lending rate to 7.75% from 7.50%, effective tomorrow, Feb. 2, 2023.
